content: As in have the bars on the left display somewhere (or at least be easily accessible) in the menu in the right. I'm sure people probably start remembering what good stats are, but as someone who doesn't know the numbers yet it's tedious to go back and forth between menus to make sure I'm not throwing away anything good.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Would it be possible to show transcription quality in the covenant dismantle UI?

content:
I really love the game so far, and also really love the music in the game. Since we can set characters to display on the home screen, would it be possible to maybe have the OST tracks in the jukebox also be selectable to then play there as well? 

I wanted to ask here since there seemed to be a lot of positive feedback when I asked the community on Reddit, but I wasn't sure how to reach out to the devs.

Thank you for making such a great game too! I've thoroughly enjoyed my time in it thus far. I've put a few hundred hours into it already, and it has quickly become one of my favorites. 

I hope you all have a nice day, and cheers again for your time.
